text: EMI stress aur income mismatch system-level pressure hai, personal weakness ka proof nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab kya karoon aaj?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Once-only anecdote se isolation kam karna before action shift.
text: First-gen earners mein "khambe ki tarah sambhalna" mode bahut common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, log bolte kam hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koi simple raasta do.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness pe 3 tiny duty-compatible options dena.
text: Teen options: (1) 5 min paani+snack. (2) 7 min EMI due + medicine list. (3) 5 min kal ka first work task note.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehla do doable.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Selected step ko stepwise execute karwana.
text: Pehle paani ke 6 dheere ghoont lo. Phir note app mein EMI due date aur kal ka first task likho. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, clear feel ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Micro recovery validate karna.
text: Heavy load ke beech yeh step lena strong recovery signal hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab next possible.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Kal ke liye low-load mini stack dena.
text: Kal mini stack: (1) 10 min budget check. (2) 5 min follow-up mail. (3) 5 min school-fee reminder check.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mail pe hesitation.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: One-line template se hesitation kam karna.
text: Line: "Quick update shared, tomorrow first-half task confirmed." Bas.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bhej diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Duty overload recovery pattern normalise karna.
text: Duty overload mein micro-structure steps se hi system settle hota hai; tum wahi kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Steady ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Steady state validate karna.
text: Aaj tumne duty load ke beech bhi direction banayi, yeh meaningful resilience hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Confidence aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se start-to-now shift mirror karna.
text: Jahan se tum full overload mein thi, wahan se ab tumne stable pace build kar liya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab theek lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night closure ke do tiny anchors dena.
text: Sone se pehle do anchors: alarm set karo aur kal ka first task note top pe pin karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Day-end closure pe effort acknowledge karna.
text: Aaj tumne exhaustion ke beech bhi system sambhala, yeh chhoti baat nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj ke liye enough.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se role-lock se response mode shift mirror karna.
text: Ab tum sirf farz ke pressure mein nahi, planned response mode mein ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, thank you.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final reassurance with worth-outcome separation.
text: Aaj tumne structural endurance ke beech bhi direction wapas li. Ek financial jhatka tumhari poori keemat define nahi karta.
